title: Draft: V5.9 launch packet portability hardening + honest preflight status
author: pgxcare
novel_contributions: Portability hardening of V5.9 launch packet execution files
Normalization of command/path references from machine-specific absolute paths to repo-relative paths
Addition of a PR packet folder with scope, rules audit, reviewer checklist, and post-run update checklists
Honest preflight status reporting with strict preflight gating behavior
No changes to model-family search, thresholds, or score claims to maintain clarity and reviewer focus
